label: WF2 — S.E.A. Framework
title: Scope. Evaluate. Act. This is the rhythm of every productive AI interaction. You define the scope, evaluate the output, and decide the action—the AI doesn't do that for you.
subtitle: S.E.A. Framework

label: WF2 — Four Quadrants of Knowledge
title: Known Knowns. Known Unknowns. Unknown Knowns. Unknown Unknowns. Your AI collaborator is uniquely good at surfacing the third quadrant—the things you know but haven't said yet.
subtitle: Four Quadrants
